Rewards and Rules
AI
DeAgent.AI
DeAgent.AI is a AI-based layer focused on artificial intelligence, dedicated to building a decentralized network platform. This platform enables users to create and deploy their own AI agents, incentivizing the creation of high-quality agents through a token-based economy, thus driving innovation and development in the field of artificial intelligence.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
CharacterX
CharacterX is the next-gen decentralized synthetic network. It provides a social platform where users can create AI identities and connect with others (including AIs, humans & communities). Based on large user groups and diverse communities on the platform, it also provides a launchpad for diverse AI derivatives.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Alaya
Alaya is a distributed AI data platform that integrates collection and labeling, that originated from Swarm Intelligence and connects communities, data, and AI through Social Commerce, providing the AI industry with high quality scalable data and full protection of its ownership and privacy. Alaya is equipped with a gamified AI data training platform and has achieved exponential growth through its built-in social recommendation mechanism. The community is used to solve the pain point of lack of data and scarcity of labor for AI practit.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
LayerNet
LayerNet is a decentralized AI ecosystem targeting end consumers. By aggregating existing decentralized computing power, we offer end consumers the ability to run various nodes and AI/ZK mining with a single click. Our goal is to become the cloud platform that supports the decentralized infrastructure network of the blockchain, where everyone can easily purchase various services to support the decentralized operation of the entire blockchain.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
0xScope
The 0xScope Web3 AI data layer has served as a strong foundation to Web3 AI builders' dapps and protocols. 0xScope has also built B2C applications on top of this data layer, including its latest AI trading companion Scopechat, which is in the process of being integrated into major Web3 platforms and wallets. Currently, 0xScope is focusing on improving Jarvis, the AI technology powering Scopechat, to transform natural language and user intentions into actionable Web3 tasks, lowering usage barriers and enhancing product experiences as Intent as a Service (IAAS).
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
EdgeMatrix Computing
EMC is a leading #AI #DePIN in AI+Web3, bridging the computing power network and AI (d)apps. EMC has jointly issued the world's first GPU #RWA
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Solidus Ai Tech
Solidus unveils an eco-friendly High-Performance Computing (HPC) Data Centre spanning 8,000 sq ft in Europe. AITECH, the world’s first deflationary AI infrastructure utility token, facilitates access to the Artificial Intelligence & GPU Marketplace. AITECH powers the Solidus AI Tech ecosystem, enabling seamless service procurement. Conventional payment methods are accepted, with fiat currency transactions seamlessly converted to AITECH on the Blockchain. A percentage of AITECH tokens used for services will be systematically burned, ensuring transparency via a comprehensive dashboard. This deflationary token economy optimizes efficiency while reducing environmental impact.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Eternal AI
Eternal AI is an open AI infrastructure on Bitcoin that benefits all humankind and is owned by none.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Pond
Pond @PondDiscoveries is building the first decentralized Graph Neural Network (GNN) model for Web 3.0. This model is designed to learn on-chain behaviors and predict future behaviors.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
BTC ECO
HOTFI
HOTFI is constructing a DEFI ecosystem tailored for BRC20 tokens, leveraging the Ordinals protocol and EVM protocol. At its core, there's a decentralized liquidity solution for BRC20 tokens, laying the groundwork for a diverse array of DEFI applications. Its features include Inscribe, OrderBook, Swap, LaunchPad, NFT Publication, Marketplace, and more. Additionally, the HOTFI team is expanding support for other BTC derivative assets while actively developing a BTC Layer2 project and a BTC AA wallet. These efforts aim to extend the potential of the BTC chain by streamlining transactions and enhancing both functionality and security.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Satoshi Protocol
Satoshi Protocol is the first CDP protocol backed by Bitcoin, users could deposit BTC as collateral to borrow stablecoin SAT. This serves as the cornerstone for BTCfi to unleash trillions worth of Bitcoin.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Tuna Chain
Tuna Chain is the first modular Layer 2 solution on Bitcoin, featuring a native stablecoin and a Hybrid ZK-OP solution. It seamlessly fuses Bitcoin's security with Ethereum's versatility.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
B² Network
B² Network is the first Bitcoin Rollup based on zero-knowledge proof verification. This Layer-2 solution enhances transaction speeds and broadens application diversity, all without compromising security. B² provides a DA Layer that’s integrated with the state transition verification and proof system, and in turn reduces costs & time associated with on-chain proof.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Master Protocol
Modularized Restaking Protocol tailored to ALL LSTs
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
BVM
For an intro, BVM is the first modular Bitcoin L2 metaprotocol, enabling builders to launch their own Bitcoin L2 blockchain in a few clicks BVM has established partnerships with NEAR, 0xPolygon, Avail, etc., which serves as DA layers to address scalability constraints of Bitcoin.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Hiveswap
Hiveswap is the NO.1 SWAP in the Bitcoin ecosystem, utilizing the interoperable Bitcoin layer MAP Protocol to provide liquidity services for assets in the Bitcoin ecosystem, including assets on Bitcoin L1, the MAP Protocol interoperability layer, and various Bitcoin L2s.

AlphaOrBeta
The 1st dynamic opinion market & continuous prediction market empowered by @OpinionLabsxyz. #Binance MVB 7 Cohort.

LFG!
LFG! is a Web3 video-based edutainment platform and UGC ecosystem that empowers users to create, share, and explore educational and entertaining video content on any Web3 trend. Actualizing the concept of a Web3 TikTok, LFG! opens a more accessible gateway to mastering the latest Web3 trends through personalized content delivery by leveraging advanced AI algorithms, enabling users from all walks of life to dive into the depths of Web3 technologies, concepts and innovations. At LFG!, our mission is to seamlessly integrate Web3 education with entertainment for users to discover and express their creative potential freely. We strive to ultimately onboard the first billion users into Web3, and empower them to be part of the new wave of Web3 digital expression and knowledge sharing.

LightCycle
LightCycle - a realistic virtual commercial city, has been created using Unreal Engine 5 and real-time edge rendering.

Cryfi
Cryfi is a marketplace where pro traders can monetize their knowledge right from Telegram, and newbies can earn & learn from blockchain-verified traders. 🔸 Immutable & verifiable trading history of every Signal Provider via Proof-of-Signal 🔸 Easy to get started: join Cryfi as a signals' follower or Signal Provider in under 5 min 🔸 Secure payment and signal channel management 🔸 Execute signals on CEX or DEX in seconds right from Telegram 👉 V1 is live in Telegram: @CryfiBot.

SoMon
🌐 Social Monster (SoMon) is your Web3 Forum on Base, fueled by OpenSocial.SoMon empower users to own their decentralized voice and identity on-chain!<br>🌐 Open Social Protocol to offer the best data, tooling, and financial layer with a couple of internal teams building dApps on top of its design partners. Our vision is to enable the largest multi-chain social economy ultimately.</p>

Web3Port
Web3Port provides comprehensive full-cycle services and investment support for Web3 projects at all stages. With our primary market investment funds and secondary market liquidity funds, facilitating the complete lifecycle of startups, including investment, financing, management, and exit, through a one-stop Web3 accelerator platform.

Chainbase Network
Chainbase is the first omnichain data network. Its core mission is to provide a transparent, reliable, permissionless data layer for the AI era.

2049U Tokens
GoPlus
GoPlus is building SecWare X, a Web3 user security network that prioritizes transparency and user empowerment by providing permissionless security data and a decentralized end-user service environment. GoPlus handles over 21 million data calls daily, affirming its robust presence in the field.We unveiled a user-centric personal security center, SecwareX, at March 2024. It has 1.62 million active users and 43,000 paid subscribers now.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Roam by MetaBlox
Roam transforms internet access with a decentralized network and OpenRoaming™, connecting you seamlessly to over 3.5 million OpenRoaming™ WiFi access points. It simplifies connectivity, enhances security, and rewards every connection via its proprietary DID solution. Roam permits the capture and utilization of rich user data (who, what, where) while promising the anonymity of decentralized IDs to permit data incentivization without compromising user identity.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
4EVERLAND
4EVERLAND is an all-in-one Web3 cloud computing platform, dedicated to DePIN + AI, offering distributed, efficient, self-motivated, and user-friendly solutions.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Mind Network
Mind Network is the first Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) based general-purpose Restaking Rollup solution, bringing secure computation and consensus to the EigenLayer and Ethereum ecosystems. Mind Network’s solution enables verifiable decentralized compute over encrypted data, which solves significant challenges for use cases such as decentralized GPU networks processing AI workloads as well as Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks that manage sensitive user data, among others. Mind Network’s solution has found initial product-market-fit with projects such as AIOZ, Nimble AI, ChainLink, etc. adopting its solution, and has 600k+ active users and 3.2M+ transactions processed on its testnet.Mind Network is backed by Binance Labs, Hashkey, Big Brain, Chainlink, Comma3, SevenX, and received an Ethereum grant to conduct research on practical implementations for FHE technology on Ethereum.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
ALIENX
ALIENX, the only staking blockchain driven by AI nodes, supporting BTC, ETH, ARB, SOL, and NFTs for earning, built for the mass adoption of NFTs and games. The ALIENX blockch ain is launched in strategic collaboration with AlienSwap, Offchain Labs, and Caldera and built on Arbitrum Orbit technology.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
ZKFair
ZKFair is the first community ZK-L2 based on Polygon CDK and Celestia DA, powered by Lumoz, a ZK-RaaS provider. ZKFair utilizes stablecoin USDC as the gas token. ZKFair ensures 100% EVM compatibility, exceptional performance, minimal fees, and robust security.

OKX Ventures
OKX Ventures is the investment arm of leading crypto exchange and Web3 technology company OKX, with an initial capital commitment of USD 100 million.

Launched from UXLINK ecology, AIRDROP2049 is a branded event which intend to connect outstanding crypto projects and active users online. The inaugural AIRDROP2049 is co-organized by UXLINK and OKX_Ventures, and co-organized by Web3Port_Labs and TrustaLabs.

2049U Tokens
Xircus
Xircus is the first No Code App Builder on Telegram Xircus is a leader in the Web3 arena, offering a versatile no-code platform that simplifies app creation across various industries. With its innovative approach, users can design, customize, and monetize apps and services on Telegram, and launch their smart contracts on the TON Blockchain at the same time. Think Wordpress for Web3. Xircus is backed by TON Bootcamp <> Hashkey accelerator program.

Crystal Fun
Crystal Fun is a decentralized gaming mega-ecosystem and studio. It aims to seamlessly integrate high-quality games within sustainable economic systems, ushering in a groundbreaking gaming experience into Web3.

2049U Tokens
ReneVerse
ReneVerse is a Web3-enabled advertising tech that brings non-intrusive, in-game ads and industry-first brand-curated product placements into the playable environments of games, at scale.With over 20+ partnered games and brands, ReneVerse can reach millions of gamers with its next-gen ad-viewing experience, achieving greater campaign performance for brands, unlocking enhanced ad monetization opportunities for games, and offering players a non-invasive in-game ad experience coupled with Web3 rewards.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
DegenVerse
DegenGame is an innovative Web3 strategy tower defense game with a European and American style. It combines real-time battles, MOBA, strategy, dungeon exploration, social interaction, and guild gameplay. Novice players can get started within a minute, while experienced players can delve into the game's infinite possibilities.
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
The Animal Age
The AnimalAge metaverse is a player-centric virtual world where players can explore, interact with others, nurture and showcase their pets, and create and share content. TAA offers not only kitten NFTs and basic features such as virtual kitten raising, breeding, and R2E (raise-to-earn), but also introduces innovative gameplay elements like on-chain battles, social interactions, online live streams, blind box openings, AI assistants, and AIGC. In addition, we collaborate with offline animal organizations and merchants, bridging the pet economy between Web2 and Web3.

WowFish
WowFish is an innovative crypto fishing game. We aim to create a 'Easy start, Easy play, Easy fun' experience. In WowFish, you can farm your weapons, enjoy solo fishing, multiplayer fishing, world boss and pvp fishing games. Enjoy the game and invite friends to have fun together!<br>WEBSITE | TWITTER | TELEGRAM | DISCORD<br>● Website: http://www.wowfish.io <br>● Twitter: https://twitter.com/WowFish_io<br>● Telegram: https://t.me/wowfishing<br>● Discord: discord.gg/n2F4qA3Z2g<br>_<br>HIGHLIGHTS & MILESTONES<br>● Ton Bootcamp Accelerator Program Project<br>● Alpha version launched with 40k+ community members<br>● Easy to play and sharing design<br>_<br>DOCS<br>● Demo: @wowfishgamebot<br>● Whitepaper: https://wowfish.gitbook.io/wowfish-whiterpaper/</p>
2049 USDT
2049U Tokens
Taki Games
Taki Games is building the Web3 Zynga: A player-owned Web3 mobile gaming network that brings real players and gaming revenue on-chain through TAKI. Powered by its unique tokenomics model, Taki Games lets loyal players earn real value and a stake in the TAKI network by earning TAKI rewards.Taki Games is bringing gaming’s 3 billion users to Web3 with games that are easy, fun, and rewarding. The network includes hit titles like Bored Button, Mom’s Kitchen, and more, totaling over 5 million downloads and 300,000 monthly active users.Taki Games is also bringing gaming’s $200 billion in annual revenue to Web3 by combining proven loyalty systems with innovative tokenomics (“Takinomics”). Players earn TAKI based on the value they generate for the network by playing games; and Taki Games purchases TAKI tokens on the open market to fund these rewards. Taki Games initiated these rewards in December 2023. TAKI supports Polygon and Solana as of January 2024.

NexGami is a Web3 gaming platform, aims to be the prime venue for hosting competitive gaming events across various titles. Its mission is to bring traditional gamers into the Web3 space, offering the tangible benefits of tokenomics. “Connecting Web3 and traditional gaming, shaping the digital game mentors of tomorrow.”

Quantlytica
Quantlytica builds a one-stop DeFi aggregation platform. Using AI, machine learning, and statistics models, it conducts horizontal comparisons of returns, liquidity risks, and safety across all DeFi projects on the market. Quantlytica can automate various capital allocations, optimizing benefits to meet user needs.We help Web3 users who prefer low risk or lack product differentiation skills in DeFi to reduce the uncertainty and opportunity cost of choosing projects. Through simple aggregated operations, we automate participation in the quick evolving of BTC ecosystem.

TonUP is on a mission to discover and nurture the most promising projects out there, bringing exciting opportunities to the wider community.
